mapper.insert:
INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0301-01_2#Sql001 */ INTO FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER ( IFA_ORDER_NO, IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, ACCEPT_ORDER_NO, ACCEPT_ORDER_SUB_NO, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BRAND_CODE, BRAND_NAME, EXCHANGE_CODE, METHOD_TYPE, TRADE_TYPE, ORDER_QUANTITY, TRADE_METHOD_TYPE, LIMIT_PRICE, STOP_PRICE, CURRENCY_CODE, SETTLEMENT_TYPE, DEPOSIT_TYPE, INVITATION_TYPE, ORDER_METHOD_TYPE, WARNING_APPLY_TYPE, EXPLANATION_INFO_TYPE, TRANSFER_INVITATION_TYPE, ENG_PUB_BRAND_EXP_TYPE, CONFIRMATION_TYPE, ORDER_TYPE, ORDER_DATE, ORDER_TIME, TRADE_DATE, TRADE_LIMIT_DATE, BROKER_CODE, INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, API_ERROR_CODE, API_STATUS_CODE, API_MESSAGE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER ) VALUES ( #{req.ifaOrderNo}, #{req.ifaOrderSubNo}, #{req.acceptOrderNo}, #{req.acceptOrderSubNo}, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, #{req.brandCode}, #{req.brandName}, #{req.exchangeCode}, #{req.methodType}, #{req.tradeType}, #{req.orderQuantity}, #{req.tradeMethodType}, #{req.limitPrice}, #{req.stopPrice}, #{req.currencyCode}, #{req.settlementType}, #{req.depositType}, #{req.invitationType}, #{req.orderMethodType}, #{req.warningApplyType}, #{req.explantionInfoType}, #{req.transferInvitationType}, #{req.engPubBrandExpType}, #{req.confirmationType}, #{req.orderType},
'19000101',
#{req.orderDate},
TO_DATE(#{req.orderTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{req.tradeDate}, #{req.tradeLimitDate}, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.intermediaryEmpCd}, NULL, NULL, NULL, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0301-01_2#Sql003 */ TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 5, '0') AS IFA_ORDER_NO FROM DUAL
